name: synastry
description: HR compatibility analysis using natal chart context and pluggable AI providers.

scripts.dev:frontend: npm run build --workspace @synastry/contracts && npm run dev --workspace @synastry/frontend
scripts.dev:backend: npm run build --workspace @synastry/contracts && npm run dev --workspace @synastry/backend
scripts.build: npm run build --workspace @synastry/contracts && npm run build --workspace @synastry/backend && npm run build --workspace @synastry/frontend
scripts.typecheck: npm run build --workspace @synastry/contracts && npm run typecheck --workspace @synastry/backend && npm run typecheck --workspace @synastry/frontend && npm run typecheck --workspace @synastry/contracts
scripts.test: npm run build --workspace @synastry/contracts && npm run test --workspace @synastry/contracts && npm run test --workspace @synastry/backend && npm run test --workspace @synastry/frontend
scripts.test:run: npm run build --workspace @synastry/contracts && npm run test:run --workspace @synastry/contracts && npm run test:run --workspace @synastry/backend && npm run test:run --workspace @synastry/frontend
scripts.lint: npm run lint --workspace @synastry/contracts && npm run lint --workspace @synastry/backend && npm run lint --workspace @synastry/frontend
